name: revenue-proposal-copilot
description: Turn discovery notes into priced service proposals, SOWs, and client-ready offer packages.

interface.shortDescription: Draft scoped, priced proposals from sales notes.
interface.longDescription: Revenue Proposal Copilot helps consultants, agencies, and technical service teams convert messy discovery notes into clear scopes, fixed-price tiers, assumptions, risk controls, and client-ready proposal language.
defaultPrompt: Turn these discovery notes into a priced proposal.
Create three scope tiers for this client project.
Find risks and missing assumptions in this SOW.
